title: Self-Evo WDC v0.1.2: Witness Dependency Capture Release-Candidate Document Package
description: Self-Evo WDC v0.1.2 is a document-level release-candidate package for Witness Dependency Capture controls in bounded self-evolution governance for c = a + b systems. It includes Markdown sources, academic PDF renderings, review records, gate records, manifests, and checksums. It is not a conformance certificate, not deployment authorization, not a safety proof, not witness-independence certification, and not live self-evolution permission.
